languages.text: "Он солгал! Как ты можешь верить столь очевидной попытке нашего общего врага посеять раздор среди нас?"

traits.locale_text: "Он солгал! Как ты можешь верить столь очевидной попытке нашего общего врага посеять раздор среди нас?"

languages.text: "He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"
languages.original_text: "Он солгал! Как ты можешь верить столь очевидной попытке нашего общего врага посеять раздор среди нас?"

traits.locale_text: "He lied! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"
"He lied! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"
"He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"
"He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"
"He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"

languages.text: "Er hat gelogen! Wie kannst du auf einen so offensichtlichen Trick unseres gemeinsamen Feindes hereinfallen, um Misstrauen zwischen uns zu säen?"
languages.original_text: "He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"

traits.locale_text: "Er hat gelogen! Wie kannst du auf einen so offensichtlichen Trick unseres gemeinsamen Feindes hereinfallen, um Misstrauen zwischen uns zu säen?"

languages.text: "Il a menti ! Comment pouvez-vous tomber dans le panneau d'un stratagème aussi évident de notre ennemi commun pour semer la méfiance entre nous ?"
languages.original_text: "He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"

traits.locale_text: "Il a menti ! Comment pouvez-vous tomber dans le panneau d'un stratagème aussi évident de notre ennemi commun pour semer la méfiance entre nous ?"

languages.text: "¡Estaba mintiendo! ¿Cómo puedes caer en una estratagema tan obvia de nuestro enemigo común para sembrar la desconfianza entre nosotros?".
languages.original_text: "He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"

traits.locale_text: "¡Estaba mintiendo! ¿Cómo puedes caer en una estratagema tan obvia de nuestro enemigo común para sembrar la desconfianza entre nosotros?".

languages.text: "Yalan söylüyordu! Ortak düşmanımızın aramıza güvensizlik tohumları ekmek için yaptığı bu kadar bariz bir oyuna nasıl kanarsınız?"
languages.original_text: "He was lying! How can you fall for such an obvious ploy by our common enemy to sow distrust among us?"

traits.locale_text: "Yalan söylüyordu! Ortak düşmanımızın aramıza güvensizlik tohumları ekmek için yaptığı bu kadar bariz bir oyuna nasıl kanarsınız?"
